data.title: Precision Biologics will reveal efficacy of new ADC against human ovarian cancer at AACR conference. (characters: 94)
data.description: Bethesda-based Precision Biologics, Inc. announced on September 19, 2025, that their innovative Antibody-Drug Conjugate (ADC) PB-223 (PB-vcMMAE-5) has demonstrated promising effectiveness in both in vitro and in vivo studies. This novel treatment utilizes an anti-core 2 O-glycans anti-human carcinoma monoclonal antibody and has shown efficacy against human ovarian cancer cells that express truncated core 2 O-glycans. The results of the study highlight the potential of this treatment in targeting and combating ovarian cancer.

data.title: PermRock Royalty Trust declared cash distribution for record holders of Trust Units on Sept. 30, paying on Oct. 15, 2025.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, PermRock Royalty Trust (NYSE: PRT) announced that it will be providing a monthly cash distribution to record holders of its Trust Units as of September 30, 2025. This distribution will be payable on October 15, 2025.

data.title: C2 Management boosts advertising with IRA & joins panel at 2025 conference in Westminster, CO.
data.description: A leading asset recovery and electronics recycling company in the Mid-Atlantic region has announced a major investment in advertising with the Investment Recovery Association (IRA). As part of their commitment, the company will also be participating in a panel discussion at the upcoming 2025 Investment Recovery Association Conference & Trade Show in Westminster, Colorado. The event, set to take place next week, is expected to attract a large audience, including industry professionals and experts. This move underlines the company's dedication to promoting sustainable practices and engaging with key stakeholders in the field.

data.title: China-ASEAN launch meteorological AI initiative at forum in Nanning, with participants from 7 countries and WMO.
data.description: A meteorological cooperation forum was held in Nanning, Guangxi, China from September 17 to 19. The 4th China-ASEAN Meteorological Cooperation Forum brought together decision-makers, experts, and scholars from meteorological and hydrological departments of China and ASEAN countries including Brunei, Cambodia, Laos, Vietnam, Thailand, Myanmar, and Indonesia. Participants also hailed from the World Meteorological Organization (WMO), universities, enterprises, and research institutions. The forum aimed to discuss regional meteorological cooperation, involving a significant number of attendees from various sectors.

data.title: SOL aims for $250-260 breakout in 7 days due to technical momentum, MACD signal bullish trend despite resistance at $253.
data.description: According to forecasts, the price of SOL is anticipated to experience a notable increase, potentially reaching $250-260 by September 26, 2025. This projection is based on Solana trading above important moving averages and showcasing positive MACD momentum. Although the cryptocurrency is currently facing resistance at the $253 mark, there is optimism for a significant surge in value in the near future.

AMERICANS HAVING RECORD LOW SEX — LOWER THAN DURING PANDEMIC: WSJ U.S. adults report the steepest drop in sexual activity on record, with fewer than 4 in 10 saying they have sex weekly — down sharply from the 1990s — and young adults increasingly going a full year without sex,

data.title: Rokt will leverage AI to deliver non-endemic messages on Cinemark's payment page, starting Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: Rokt, a prominent ecommerce technology firm leveraging machine learning and AI to enhance transaction relevance for shoppers, has revealed its latest initiative. As of September 19, 2025, Rokt will utilize its AI technology to present non-endemic messages on Cinemark's ecommerce payment page. This move underscores Rokt's continuous innovation in reaching consumers, aiming to deliver tailored experiences.

data.title: Dow Jones futures rise with Tesla surging on Elon Musk's stock move. Nvidia falls on China antitrust ruling. Fed meeting nears.
data.description: On Monday morning, Tesla experienced a significant surge in its stock price following a strategic move made by CEO Elon Musk. Meanwhile, Nvidia faced a decline in its stock value due to an antitrust ruling in China. Investors are also anticipating the upcoming Federal Reserve meeting. Dow Jones Futures indicated a rise in the market, with Tesla witnessing a notable increase and Nvidia facing a dip in response to recent developments in China.

data.title: Leading proxy advisory firms ISS and Glass Lewis recommend FLINT Corp. shareholders vote for recapitalization to reduce debt. Meeting on Sept. 23, 2025, at 8:00 am in Calgary.
data.description: FLINT Corp. (TSX: FLNT) in Calgary, Alberta, announced on Sept. 15, 2025, that ISS and Glass Lewis have endorsed the proposed Recapitalization Transaction at the upcoming special meeting on Sept. 23, 2025. The transaction aims to cut the Company’s debt and annual interest expenses, streamline its capital organization, and boost liquidity for common shareholders. The meeting is scheduled for 8:00 a.m. (Calgary time).

data.title: Nasdaq hits record high, Palantir has a strong week, Gemini launches. Dow doesn't gain, Apple loses post-Iphone event.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average failed to record any gain. Apple faced a decline for the week following its iPhone event. The Nasdaq closed at a record high, marking a notable milestone. Palantir had a strong week in the stock market while Gemini made its debut. This data was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: SafeSpace Global Corporation partners with Signature HealthCARE to enhance resident safety through AI technology.
data.description: In Knoxville, TN on September 19, 2025, SafeSpace Global Corporation (OTCID:SSGC), a prominent player in multimodal AI technology, announced a bolstered collaboration with Signature HealthCARE. Signature HealthCARE, a healthcare organization recognized for its comprehensive care services across various states and dedication to person-centered care, has increased its focus on resident safety by partnering with SafeSpace Global Corporation. This new agreement, starting on September 19, 2025, aims to enhance care capabilities for residents, provide assistance to staff in a competitive labor market, and improve safety protocols in various communities.

data.title: Dow drops on inflation data, Oracle stock soars 36%. S&P 500, Nasdaq hit record highs. Source: Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Yesterday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following unexpected inflation data. Meanwhile, AI stock Oracle saw a significant 36% increase in its earnings. Despite the Dow dropping, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq managed to achieve record highs. The rise of Nvidia and Oracle was notable in the stock market. This information was highlighted in a live coverage report, emphasizing the importance of a forthcoming key inflation report.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures saw Astera, Nvidia, Palantir, Robinhood, Tesla as movers; Apple iPhone event upcoming.
data.description: Stocks like Astera, Nvidia, Palantir, Robinhood, and Tesla saw significant movement on Monday, affecting Dow Jones Futures. The upcoming Apple iPhone event is generating anticipation in the market. Stay updated with the latest news on these stocks and the event.

data.title: Dow rises, Nasdaq hits high today. Robinhood, Tesla, Amazon in focus. Elon Musk deal boosts stock. Live updates from Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a slight increase on the stock market. Robinhood witnessed a significant surge, while there were noticeable rises in the stock prices of Tesla and Amazon. A particular stock received a boost following a deal involving Elon Musk. This increase contributed to the overall positive performance, with the Nasdaq reaching a new high. Amazon and Tesla also hit key entry points for potential buyers. This information was shared in live coverage and reflects the current state of the stock market.

data.title: 125 combat-wounded veterans will participate in the 8th annual War Heroes on Water sportfishing event in Southern California community.
data.description: In Newport Beach, California, this weekend marks the eighth annual War Heroes on Water (WHOW) sportfishing tournament, bringing together 125 combat-wounded veterans nationwide with the Southern California sportfishing community. The event spans five days, with two full days of fishing action. It has become a beloved tradition in the SoCal area, fostering a supportive environment for veterans to bond with locals over their mutual love for sportfishing and the sea.

data.title: ADA expected to surge to $1.25 as per 3 charts, technical and onchain signals indicate a rally soon.
data.description: Various technical indicators and on-chain data are pointing towards a possible increase in the price of Cardano, with expectations of reaching the $1.25 level in the near future.
Siili Solutions Plc's Nomination Board composition: 3 members appointed by shareholders with major stakes, 1 by company board.

data.title: Trump's economic strategy relies on the Supreme Court's tariff decision. His plans include imposing tariffs on varying sectors.
data.description: The president aims to utilize the authority to impose tariffs without limits as a core component of his agenda for his second term, encompassing areas such as trade and foreign policy.

data.title: Core CPI inflation surpasses 3%, won't hinder Fed rate cuts; S&P 500 increases. Fed remains unaffected.
data.description: The latest data shows an increase in the core Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation rate, surpassing the 3% mark. Despite this rise, the upward trend is not substantial enough to deter the Federal Reserve from their plan of implementing rate cuts. The Standard & Poor's 500 index experienced a boost following this development, indicating positive market response.
